item.title: Download Topaz Photo Pro 1.4.1

item.title: Download NetworkTrafficView 2.51
item.description: NetworkTrafficView is a statistical software package are grouped according to Type of Ethernet, IP protocol, source Address / destination and port Source / Destination. For each line of the statistics, the following information is displayed: Type Ethernet (IPv4, IPv6, ARP), IP protocol (TCP, UDP, ICMP), source Address, destination Address, source Port, destination Port, service Name (http, ftp, etc.), Count package, Total package size, Total data size, data Speed, data Speed, maximum...

item.title: Download RapidRAW 1.5.3
item.description: RapidRAW is a modern, high-performance, open-source RAW photo editor, designed to deliver a fast and clean editing experience with a lightweight footprint (under 30MB). Built with performance and usability in mind, the software is aimed at photographers who want a simple, efficient, and fun workflow without compromising performance. Key Features GPU-accelerated processing: Uses a custom WGSL shader to process all image adjustments on the GPU, allowing for smooth, responsive editing...

item.title: Download ExifTool 13.54
item.description: ExifTool is a library of Perl platform-independent plus a command line application for reading, writing, and editing meta information in various file types. ExifTool supports many metadata formats including EXIF , GPS , IPTC , XMP , JFIF , GeoTIFF , ICC Profile , Photoshop IRB , FlashPix , AFCP and ID3 , as well as notes of the manufacturer of many digital cameras by Canon , Casio , DJI , FLIR , FujiFilm , GE , GoPro , HP , JVC / Victor , Kodak , Leaf , Minolta / Konica-Minolta , Motorola...

item.description: Abelssoft KeyDepot is a password manager software designed to securely store and manage passwords, logins, and other sensitive data. The software uses advanced encryption technology, specifically AES-256 encryption, to protect user data from unauthorized access. KeyDepot allows users to create a master password to secure access to their password vault, and this master password will never be stored on Abelssoft servers for added security. item.title: Download KiCad 10.0.0-1
